 I don't know, but I imagine the answer is yes, from just looking at
 the sources. I tried backporting some of the (relevant) changes from
 later revisions of several related files, but nothing helped. I'm
 surprised this issue has never come up before.
 
 I don't have the time and resources right now to test on -current
 since all our test machines run on 5.4.
 
 I'm new to this whole bug reporting thing, so excuse me if I don't
 reply to the proper lists...
 
 -victor
 
 On 7/4/07, M. Warner Losh <imp@bsdimp.com> wrote:
 > The following reply was made to PR usb/114310; it has been noted by GNATS.
 >
